title: Daredevil
content:
{{Disambiguation | main = Matthew Murdock (Earth-616) | main_name = Matthew Murdock | main_title = Daredevil | main_image = Devil's Reign Omega Vol 1 1 Reis Variant Textless.jpg | logo = [[File:Daredevil Vol 6 Logo.png|300px|center]] | noimage = No Image Male.jpg | description = Daredevil is a fearless vigilante who fights crime in [[Hell's Kitchen]]. Gifted with enhanced senses, though at the cost of his sight, attorney '''[[Matthew Murdock]]''' has created the infernal mantle of Daredevil to bring justice to the streets besides the courtroom. His life as Daredevil is marked by severe tragedies that still do not deviate him from his righteous mission. As part of a prophecy, the deadly assassin '''[[Elektra|Elektra Natchios]]''' assumed the mantle of Daredevil when Murdock was incarcerated, which has brought her to a path of redemption at his side. {{Navigation Gallery | size = 200 | list = [[Elektra|Elektra Natchios]]
